contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Hit List warm-up audit — TIME-format bug masking 32 phantom AU=0; true count is 5
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/65
  
  Details:
  Continued the warm-up prospect investigation past the 143-row formula backfill (prior contribution today). Major finding overturns the headline — the Oracle advisory's '50 of 79 stores have zero logged warm-up sends' was driven by a TIME-format display bug, not a real outreach gap.
  
  ROOT CAUSE (cell formatting):
  - Hit List columns AU (Warm-up email sent) and AV (Follow-up emails sent) were formatted as TIME h:mm. Underlying COUNTIFS values were correct, but a value of 2 rendered as '0:00' (because 2 days mod 24h = 0). 32 of 79 warm-up rows displayed '0:00' while actually holding 2.
  - The bug propagated everywhere downstream that read FORMATTED_VALUE: the Oracle advisory snapshot, my own first-pass bucketing, and any operator eyeballing the Hit List.
  
  FIX APPLIED (live):
  - batchUpdate request changed AU2:AV<last> userEnteredFormat.numberFormat from {type: TIME, pattern: 'h:mm'} to {type: NUMBER, pattern: '0'}, alignment RIGHT. 668 rows reformatted in one call. No formula or data changed.
  
  AUTHORITATIVE DISTRIBUTION (UNFORMATTED_VALUE, post-fix, 79 'AI: Warm up prospect' stores):
    AU=0:  5
    AU=1:  5
    AU=2: 65
    AU=3:  4
  
  THE 5 TRUE AU=0 STORES — bucketed:
  
  Bucket 1 — placeholder email (3 stores, 60%): rows 373 Mossy Tonic, 540 Cascadia Crystals, 605 Avebury Mystikals all carry email='filler@godaddy.com'. Contact enrichment never found a real address yet they were promoted to 'AI: Warm up prospect' anyway. Operator action: either re-run hit_list_enrich_contact, or manually find an email, or demote to 'AI: Enrich with contact'. Suggested guardrail: hit_list_status_promote.py should refuse to promote rows whose Email is the filler value.
  
  Bucket 2 — duplicate Hit List row (1 store): row 501 Roots & Crowns Apothecary. Real email present (hello@rootsandcrowns.com). 2 warm-ups already sent for this exact business under store_key 'roots--crowns-apothecary__1812-nw-24th-ave-portland-or-97210' (older normalization). Row 501 has store_key 'roots-crowns-apothecary__1812-northwest-24th-avenue__portland__or' (newer normalization). Same physical store at 1812 NW 24th Ave, Portland OR. Operator action: merge or close the duplicate row.
  
  Bucket 3 — legitimately uncontacted new location (1 store): row 577 Mountain Rose Herbs Mercantile SEATTLE at 2111 1st Ave Seattle WA. The Eugene OR original location (152 W 5th Ave) has 2 warm-ups; Seattle is a separate retail location and has had no draft created yet. Operator action: next suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py cron tick should pick this up; if cron is skipping it, debug eligibility filters.
  
  CORRECTIONS TO PRIOR ARTIFACTS:
  - ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT.md 'AI: Warm up prospect: 79 stores -- warmup depth (none / once / >=2): 50 / 3 / 26' is wrong. Real: '5 / 5 / 69'. Generator generate_advisory_snapshot.py should be updated to read AU/AV with valueRenderOption=UNFORMATTED_VALUE so future snapshots are accurate.
  - My prior contribution today claimed the formula backfill closed the 50-vs-37 gap by recovering 13 stores. That recovery was real for the 143 sheet-wide rows missing formulas, but the warm-up bucket's apparent 50->37 drop was also coincidentally affected by the format bug. Both fixes were needed; both have landed.
  
  FOLLOW-UPS LOGGED (for OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md, not done in this session):
  1. Patch generate_advisory_snapshot.py to read UNFORMATTED_VALUE for AU/AV.
  2. Patch hit_list_status_promote.py to skip rows where Email='filler@godaddy.com'.
  3. Audit other Hit List columns formatted as TIME but holding integer counts (potentially same bug elsewhere).
  4. Dedupe Roots & Crowns Apothecary (row 501 vs whichever older row holds the contacted records).
  5. Verify suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py is processing Mountain Rose Herbs Mercantile Seattle (row 577) on its next tick.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------
